name: @sextant/conv-review
description: The review convention in TypeScript (ADR-0044) — the peer of the dashapi review logic, moved into a convention library: an artifact's review-state read-merge-CAS plus the approve→met closed loop via @sextant/conv-goals. Hand-written verb logic over @sextant/sdk; no bus feature, no new protocol.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/review.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js dist/test/coequality.test.js
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --test dist/test/review.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
